entity.summary: Global crypto and fiat financial-services platform combining regional centralized exchange services with GlobianceDEX, an automated-market-maker decentralized exchange on XDC Network, alongside wallets, OTC, payments, and multi-currency accounts.
entity.notes: Current first-party pages identify Globiance as a financial-services group with cryptocurrency exchanges and regional platforms and separately identify GlobianceDEX as an XDC Network AMM. HEI models the Globiance exchange brand as one hybrid entity rather than splitting the centralized regional exchange surfaces and branded DEX into separate exchange entities.

evidence.title: Globiance official platform
evidence.notes: Current first-party homepage exposes exchange, staking, payments, OTC, merchant services, wallets, multi-currency accounts, regional login routes, and web-platform crypto trading.

evidence.title: Globiance Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party exchange page identifies Globiance Exchange as a place to buy, trade, hold, and collect crypto assets and provides current regional signup and login routes.

evidence.title: About Globiance and GlobianceDEX
evidence.notes: First-party About page describes Globiance as a group of cryptocurrency exchanges and financial institutions and identifies GlobianceDEX as an AMM deployed on XDC Network, supporting hybrid exchange classification.
